title: ... If You Meet Sartana Pray for Your Death.
writer: Luigi De Santis, Fabio Piccioni, Adolfo Cagnacci
actors: Gianni Garko, William Berger, Sydney Chaplin
plot: A gadget-laden gunfighter and gambler interferes with the complex schemes of gangsters and dignitaries hoping to steal a bank's gold and obtain the insurance payout for its theft.
